tasks.label: Flutter Build Runner
tasks.command: fvm dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && fvm dart format . && fvm dart fix --apply

tasks.label: Update OpenAPI
tasks.command: rm -rf ./openapi/client && openapi-generator generate -i openapi/openapi.json -g dart-dio -o ./openapi/client --type-mappings=date=String,Date=String,DateTime=String && cd ./openapi/client && fvm dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && fvm dart format . && fvm dart fix --apply

tasks.label: Build iOS for stg
args: fvm flutter clean && fvm flutter pub get && fvm flutter build ios --release --dart-define-from-file=dart_defines/stg.env && fvm flutter build ios --release --dart-define-from-file=dart_defines/stg.env
